queries.question: Display attendance records and grades for White.
queries.sql:
SELECT Attendance.date_attended
FROM Students JOIN Attendance ON Students.student_id = Attendance.student_id
WHERE Students.last_name = "White"
UNION
SELECT Grades.grade
FROM Students JOIN Grades ON Students.student_id = Grades.student_id
WHERE Students.last_name = "White"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?students a :Students .
    ?attendance a :Attendance .
    ?attendance p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?attendance p:date_attended ?date_attended .
    ?students p:last_name ?last_name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?last_name_f) = "White")
    BIND(?date_attended AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?students a :Students .
    ?grades a :Grades .
    ?grades p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?grades p:grade ?grade .
    ?students p:last_name ?last_name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?last_name_f) = "White")
    BIND(?grade AS ?o0)
  }
}
